stemHtml: A Traffic Advisory (TA) may be followed by a Resolution Advisory (RA). Which statement is correct?

options.a: A TA may lead to an RA if no action is taken.
options.b: A TA is a warning referring to vertical manoeuvres with small inputs.
options.c: A TA is a warning referring to horizontal manoeuvres with small inputs.
options.d: A TA only requires speed changes.
